phrases.intent_en: Ask where the nearest toilets are
phrases.text_local: Où sont les toilettes les plus proches ?
phrases.pronunciation: oo son lay twah-LET lay ploo PROHSH
phrases.cultural_note: Public toilets are available around the square.

responses.english: There are some in the Palais des Ducs, on the ground floor.
responses.phonetic: eel ee ahn ah dahn luh pah-LAY day DOOK, oh ray-duh-shoh-SAY
responses.french: Il y en a dans le Palais des Ducs, au rez-de-chaussée.

phrases.intent_en: Ask where the Maille store is from here
phrases.text_local: Où se trouve le magasin Maille à partir d'ici ?
phrases.pronunciation: oo suh TROOV luh mah-gah-ZAN myah ah par-TEER dee-SEE
phrases.cultural_note: The Maille mustard shop is just a short walk from the square, at the corner of Rue de la Liberté.

responses.english: Take Rue de la Liberté, it's 300 meters away.
responses.phonetic: pruh-NAY lah roo duh lah lee-bair-TAY, say ah trwah sahn MEHTR
responses.french: Prenez la rue de la Liberté, c'est à trois cents mètres.

phrases.intent_en: Ask where to find a restaurant on the square
phrases.text_local: Y a-t-il un bon restaurant sur la place ?
phrases.pronunciation: ee ah-TEEL uhn bohn res-toh-RAHN soor lah PLAHS
phrases.cultural_note: Several restaurants with terraces surround the square, offering Burgundian cuisine.

responses.english: Yes, several restaurants with terraces around the square.
responses.phonetic: wee, plu-ZYUHR res-toh-RAHN ah-VEK teh-RAHS oh-TOOR duh lah PLAHS
responses.french: Oui, plusieurs restaurants avec terrasse autour de la place.

phrases.intent_en: Ask about the buildings around the square
phrases.text_local: Pouvez-vous me parler des bâtiments autour de la place ?
phrases.pronunciation: poo-VAY voo muh par-LAY day bah-tee-MAHN oh-TOOR duh lah plas
phrases.cultural_note: The elegant 18th-century buildings around the square house upscale shops, restaurants, and the famous Maille mustard boutique.

responses.english: Around the square, there are shops and restaurants.
responses.phonetic: oh-TOOR duh lah PLAHS, eel ee ah day boo-TEEK ay day res-toh-RAHN
responses.french: Autour de la place, il y a des boutiques et des restaurants.

phrases.intent_en: Ask if there is a café where I can sit
phrases.text_local: Y a-t-il un café où je peux m'asseoir ?
phrases.pronunciation: ee ah-TEEL un kah-FAY oo zhuh puh mah-SWAR
phrases.cultural_note: There are several cafés with outdoor seating on the square — perfect for people-watching in the heart of Dijon.

responses.english: Yes, there are several with outdoor seating on the square.
responses.phonetic: wee, eel ee ahn ah plu-ZYUHR ah-VEK teh-RAHS soor lah PLAHS
responses.french: Oui, il y en a plusieurs avec terrasse sur la place.
